## What does this PR do? / 本 PR 做了什么?

- [ ] Add a new project / 添加新项目
- [ ] Fix a broken link / 修复链接
- [ ] Update information / 更新信息
- [ ] Other / 其他

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] The project has a clear open-source license (MIT, Apache-2.0, AGPL, GPL, MPL)
- [ ] The project is a clear alternative to a named commercial/paid AI product
- [ ] The project is active in 2025–2026
- [ ] The entry follows the format: `[**org/repo**](url) — EN description. / 中文描述。 *(alt: X)*`
- [ ] The entry is added to the bottom of the relevant category
- [ ] I have searched for duplicates

## Project details (for new additions) / 项目详情（新添加时填写）

- **Commercial tool it replaces:**
- **Category:**
